outcomes.rollFlavourText: Churn exceeded new ARR; the dashboard is just a grief counsellor now.
Flat MRR, flat morale — the product is technically alive.
Net revenue retention ticked up; someone's expanding their seat count.
Enterprise deal closed; the logo alone is worth three slide decks.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. When the full TECH stack is held, loan suppression lifts per industry rules. Founder CEO: draw 2 personal event cards, keep 1 (per CEO once-per-game ability). Non-Founder: suppression lifts; no card draw.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: When the full TECH stack is held, loan suppression lifts per industry rules. Founder CEO: draw 2 personal event cards, keep 1 (per CEO once-per-game ability). Non-Founder: suppression lifts; no card draw.

cardDescription: Generates no income. GMI-immune and loan-suppressed until vertical integration is active. Tier 1 BOOM_BUST profile — value swings on roll, not on market conditions.
flavourText: Recurring revenue is the closest thing to immortality.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: A major integration partner deprecated the endpoint; half the ecosystem just went dark.
API traffic is stable; the roadmap, less so.
Third-party developer adoption is accelerating; the platform is becoming infrastructure.
The platform hit critical mass — competitors are now building on top of you.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active. Founder CEO: MID alone suffices to activate UPSTREAM integration per CEO ability.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Once integration is active on the UPSTREAM asset you own, treat that asset's value roll as one higher.
+1 loan cap on this asset if full vertical stack is held.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 12.

cardDescription: Generates no income. GMI-immune and loan-suppressed until vertical integration is active. Unlocks a value roll bonus on UPSTREAM and a loan capacity bonus when the full TECH stack is held.
flavourText: Every platform is a tollbooth with better UX.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Infrastructure costs exceeded runway projections; the burn rate is now the product.
Uptime is fine; valuation is not — the market wants growth, not reliability.
A new enterprise contract locked in multi-year commitments; the grid is proving its worth.
Capacity constraints created a waitlist; scarcity repriced the entire offering overnight.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active (loan suppression lifted per industry rules).

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +1 to this asset's loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue once vertical integration is active (loan suppression lifted per industry rules). Financing depth unlocks with proven integration, not before.

cardDescription: Generates no income. GMI-immune and loan-suppressed until vertical integration is active. Integration permanently increases loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue by 1 on this asset.
flavourText: The foundation nobody sees until it breaks.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: A high-profile customer churned publicly; the case study is now a cautionary tale.
Renewals held, but net new pipeline is a polite fiction.
Multi-year contracts signed; enterprise sales is slow but it compounds.
The platform became the category; analysts are calling it a systems-of-record play.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active. Stack complete: once per year, draw 1 personal event card, keep or sell. Founder's once-per-game stack bonus activates here.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Stack complete: once per year, draw 1 personal event card, keep or sell. Founder's once-per-game stack bonus activates here.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 22.

cardDescription: Generates no income. GMI-immune and loan-suppressed until vertical integration is active. Full TECH stack unlocks a once-per-year personal event card draw.
flavourText: Enterprise software: where innovation goes to get a salary.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: The model hallucinated in a live demo; the funding round is now a different kind of event.
Benchmark scores improved; the market is waiting for something that isn't benchmarks.
Enterprise pilots converted; the AI is doing something useful, apparently.
A foundation model breakthrough repriced every AI asset in the sector simultaneously.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Value cannot fall below 8 from any single roll.
Treat all positive value roll deltas as +1 higher when full stack is owned.

cardDescription: Generates no income. GMI-immune and loan-suppressed until vertical integration is active. Integration provides a value floor from UPSTREAM and a positive-delta bonus when the full TECH stack is owned.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: A multi-region outage triggered SLA penalties and a very uncomfortable earnings call.
Usage metrics are flat; the hyperscalers are competing on price again.
Cloud migration contracts accelerated; the backlog is the healthiest thing on the balance sheet.
Capacity demand outpaced supply; the waitlist itself became a valuation event.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +2 additional if this asset's current value exceeds 18 and integration is active.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each ENERGY asset you own (max +2).

cardDescription: Generates no income. GMI-immune and loan-suppressed until vertical integration is active. Integration unlocks a scaling loan capacity bonus that grows further when asset value exceeds 18.
flavourText: The cloud is just someone else's data centre — and someone else's debt.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Antitrust action filed in three jurisdictions; the moat is now a liability.
Market share held, growth didn't; analysts are calling it a mature platform — which is not a compliment.
Adjacent market expansion landed; the monopoly is growing a second monopoly.
Regulatory capture confirmed, competitors exited, valuation hit escape velocity.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active. Stack complete: +1 to loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue on all owned TECH assets (applies once integration is active per industry rules). Growth-to-leverage conversion: on a roll of 6, you may instead gain +2 permanent loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue on this asset rather than applying the value delta. Activates only while integration is active.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Stack complete: +1 to loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue on all owned TECH assets. Growth-to-leverage conversion: on a roll of 6, you may instead gain +2 permanent loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue on this asset rather than applying the value delta. Only while integration is active.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +2 additional if value exceeds 32.

cardDescription: Generates no income. GMI-immune and loan-suppressed until vertical integration is active. Full TECH stack boosts loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue across all TECH assets; a max roll may be converted to permanent leverage depth instead of value growth.
flavourText: Monopoly is just network effects with better lawyers.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Training costs exceeded projected compute budgets by a factor nobody said out loud in the board meeting.
The model is improving; the economics are not — scaling laws have not resolved the unit cost problem.
A major inference deal closed; the compute is finally paying for itself.
The model crossed a capability threshold that made every prior valuation look like a rounding error.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +3 additional if value exceeds 30 and integration is active.

cardDescription: Generates no income. GMI-immune and loan-suppressed until vertical integration is active. Integration unlocks a large conditional loan capacity bonus that scales with asset value.
flavourText: At this scale, the model trains itself — and so does the debt.
